title: HostScanMethod
description: Contract for host.scan JSON-RPC method. Starts a long-running scan operation; progress arrives via operation.progress notifications.

hostId.description: ID of the skill_host_folders row to scan

HostScanResponse.title: HostScanResponse
HostScanResponse.description: Immediate response — the scan runs asynchronously. Errors: validation_error (1001) hostId not found; conflict_error (1005) host already being scanned.

operationId.description: ID of the created scan operation; use with operation.progress notifications and operation.cancel
